prompts.title: Market entry briefing
prompts.prompt: Synthesize analyst notes, competitor pricing snapshots, customer calls, and internal assumptions into a market-entry dossier.
minimum_expectations: Map the strongest signals and the biggest unknowns.
End with a clear recommendation on whether to proceed, pause, or research further.

prompts.title: Interview-heavy synthesis
prompts.prompt: Create a dossier from the interview notes, call recordings, and prior product metrics.
minimum_expectations: Cluster recurring themes without erasing disagreement.
Show which findings are well supported and which are tentative.
Translate the findings into product or GTM implications.

prompts.title: Urgent board prep
prompts.prompt: Produce a board-ready research dossier that keeps the short version crisp while preserving evidence quality underneath.
minimum_expectations: Start with the key message for the board.
List the next questions that require more research before acting.
